checks.label: clinical HTML is centralized in SafeClinicalMarkup

no raw user-facing HTML sinks remain outside SafeClinicalMarkup

generated clinical artifacts are free of mojibake markers

post-deploy retry policy remains covered by Playwright rerun workflow
